pullRequest.title: cli: add --boot secure-boot option
pullRequest.body:
The new option can be used to enable/disable secure boot verification of UEFI firmware.

If virt-xml is used to change secure-boot print warning that resetting NVRAM is required to make the change effective.

Fixes: https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager/issues/495

pullRequest.title: Add startupPolicy for USB passed through devices
pullRequest.body:
When the attribute startupPolicy set for a USB passed through devices allows such device to be missing.

The attribute accepts the following values:
* mandatory: fail if missing for any reason (the default)
* requisite: fail if missing on boot up, drop if missing on migrate/restore/revert
* optional:  drop if missing at any start attempt

Fixes: https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager/issues/846

pullRequest.title: Add XML backend using stock python ElementTree
pullRequest.body:
This is an XMLAPI backend using stock python ElementTree.
We need to extend and re-implement some of ElementTree internals
to make its output match what libvirt generates, so virt-xml edits
don't generate extraneous diffs.
    
This is disabled by default but will be used if libxml2 is not
installed. You can explicitly opt in to using it by setting
env var VIRTINST_XML_BACKEND=etree before virtinst is imported.

Tested with fedora 42 with python 3.13, and rhel9 with python 3.9
I also roundtripped all the domain XML in the libvirt test suite using the new backend.

Fixes: #897

pullRequest.title: virtinst: cloudinit: include empty meta-data file
pullRequest.body:
Refactor creation of cloud-init config files introduced a bug where we stopped including empty meta-data file.

Introduced-by: 5b2d0997a1d2d213b17c227169da64e2fa7d09a6
Fixes: https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager/issues/975

pullRequest.title: Calling loader.close() before pixbuf assignment to avoid NoneType pixbuf
pullRequest.body:
In the case `loader.close()` has more parsing to do, `get_pixbuf()` can return a `NoneType` which causes issues in the snapshot view. Calling `loader.close()` before this allows for proper cleanup before calling `get_pixbuf()`.

https://docs.gtk.org/gdk-pixbuf/method.PixbufLoader.close.html
https://docs.gtk.org/gdk-pixbuf/method.PixbufLoader.get_pixbuf.html

Fixes https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager/issues/1002

pullRequest.title: virtinst: fix locale when running in flatpak
pullRequest.body:
Module locale is used to configure C libraries. When running in flatpak we need to set correct path using locale module as well.

Resolves: https://github.com/virt-manager/virt-manager/issues/1023
